reopen_rule: Satisfied lower gates may only be reopened by current regression receipt.
workstream_objective: Select explicit posture values for D1 externality, D2 counted domains, D3 adaptive evolution, D4 comparative claims, and D5 commercial activation through one same-head Gate D decision receipt. Do not activate B04 implementation inside that decision step.

gate_domain_product_split.gate: Gate D decision posture selection only
gate_domain_product_split.domain_surface: The decision receipt may select postures for D1-D5 only. B04 civilization activation surfaces remain candidate implementation surfaces and do not count inside the decision step.

decision_questions: D1: Which explicit externality posture is selected?
D2: Which explicit counted-domain posture is selected?
D3: Which explicit adaptive-evolution posture is selected?
D4: Which explicit comparative-claims posture is selected?
D5: Which explicit commercial posture is selected?
explicit_not_authorized_before_decision: automatic B04 execution after posture selection
tracked carrier receipts standing in for same-head authority
stop_conditions: Any posture value is silently selected outside an explicit same-head Gate D decision receipt.
Any B04 implementation mutation begins inside the posture-selection step.
Any externality widening, comparator expansion, product widening, or frontier claim is authorized by default.
Any tracked carrier or documentary surface is treated as Gate D authority.
Any mutate path falls outside expected_mutate_paths.

pass: The Gate D ballot remains definition-only until a same-head decision receipt selects all five required domain postures.
B04 activation remains fail-closed until after the decision receipt exists.
The next lawful move is posture selection only and not civilization activation.
fail: Any Gate D posture is implied rather than explicitly selected.
Any decision artifact activates B04 instead of only authorizing later implementation.
Any current-head authority is sourced from tracked carriers instead of same-head proof.
